title: HOUSING AUTHORITY - 211info
text: HOUSING AUTHORITY OF CLACKAMAS COUNTY HOUSING AUTHORITY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides information, referrals, and support for landlord-tenant issues, fair housing, and complaints of housing discrimination. Maintains listings of low-income housing in Clackamas County, including non-subsidized low-cost apartments. Manages Housing Authority-owned units, subsidized rental housing, and the Section 8/Housing Choice Voucher program. Handles complaints related to public housing and Section 8. 13930 S Gain Street Oregon City, OR 97045 Eligibility: Varies by program or property Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-5pm, holiday hours posted on website Email (503) 655-8267 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 655-8267 Main phone (503) 655-8676 FAX (503) 655-8639 TTY/TTD Main phone (503) 655-8267 FAX (503) 655-8676 TTY/TTD (503) 655-8639 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: -Section 8 and Public Housing: Visit website for waitlist status; it opens occasionally. Current wait time is 3-5 years. -Low-Cost Apartments: Visit the website or call for available listings Referral Preferences: Domestic Violence Survivors: Must be referred by Clackamas Women's Services Homeless Veterans: VASH referrals accepted through the VA Shelter Plus Care: Referrals through Clackamas County Behavioral Health FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Clackamas County Services: Housing Complaints * Public Housing Residents Housing Complaints * Section 8 Housing Residents Housing Discrimination Assistance Landlord Rights Information/Counseling Low Cost Home Rental Listings Low Income/Subsidized Private Rental Housing Public Housing Section 8 Housing Choice Vouchers Specialized Information and Referral * Housing Issues Subsidized Housing Administrative Organizations Tenant Rights Information/Counseling If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. HOUSING AUTHORITY OF CLACKAMAS COUNTY
